testcase.name: HomeController GET / should return 200 OK

failure.message:
com.google.inject.CreationException: Unable to create injector, see the following errors:
1) [Guice/MissingImplementation]: No implementation for Materializer was bound.
Requested by: 1 : AhcWSClientProvider.<init>(AhcWSModule.scala:221) \_ for 2nd parameter materializer at AhcWSModule.<init>(AhcWSModule.scala:40): Binding(interface api.libs.ws.WSClient to ProviderConstructionTarget(class AhcWSClientProvider)) \_ installed by: Modules$OverrideModule -> GuiceableModuleConversions$$anon$4 2 : StandaloneWSClientProvider.<init>(AhcWSModule.scala:232) \_ for 2nd parameter materializer at AhcWSModule.<init>(AhcWSModule.scala:39): Binding(interface api.libs.ws.StandaloneWSClient to ProviderConstructionTarget(class StandaloneWSClientProvider)) \_ installed by: Modules$OverrideModule -> GuiceableModuleConversions$$anon$4 3 : AhcWSModule$AhcWSClientProvider.<init>(AhcWSModule.java:42) \_ for 2nd parameter at BindingKey.toProvider(BindingKey.java:155): Binding(interface play.libs.ws.WSClient to ProviderConstructionTarget(class AhcWSModule$AhcWSClientProvider)) \_ installed by: Modules$OverrideModule -> GuiceableModuleConversions$$anon$4 4 : AhcWSModule$StandaloneWSClientProvider.<init>(AhcWSModule.java:58) \_ for 2nd parameter at BindingKey.toProvider(BindingKey.java:155): Binding(interface play.libs.ws.StandaloneWSClient to ProviderConstructionTarget(class AhcWSModule$StandaloneWSClientProvider)) \_ installed by: Modules$OverrideModule -> GuiceableModuleConversions$$anon$4
Learn more: https://github.com/google/guice/wiki/MISSING_IMPLEMENTATION
1 error
====================== Full classname legend: ====================== AhcWSClientProvider: "play.api.libs.ws.ahc.AhcWSClientProvider" AhcWSModule: "play.api.libs.ws.ahc.AhcWSModule" AhcWSModule$AhcWSClientProvider: "play.libs.ws.ahc.AhcWSModule$AhcWSClientProvider" AhcWSModule$StandaloneWSClientProvider: "play.libs.ws.ahc.AhcWSModule$StandaloneWSClientProvider" BindingKey: "play.inject.BindingKey" GuiceableModuleConversions$$anon$4: "play.api.inject.guice.GuiceableModuleConversions$$anon$4" Materializer: "org.apache.pekko.stream.Materializer" Modules$OverrideModule: "com.google.inject.util.Modules$OverrideModule" StandaloneWSClientProvider: "play.api.libs.ws.ahc.StandaloneWSClientProvider" api.libs.ws.StandaloneWSClient: "play.api.libs.ws.StandaloneWSClient" api.libs.ws.WSClient: "play.api.libs.ws.WSClient" ======================== End of classname legend: ========================

testcase.name: HomeController GET / should return HTML content type

failure.message:
com.google.inject.CreationException: Unable to create injector, see the following errors:
1) [Guice/MissingImplementation]: No implementation for Materializer was bound.
Requested by: 1 : AhcWSClientProvider.<init>(AhcWSModule.scala:221) \_ for 2nd parameter materializer at AhcWSModule.<init>(AhcWSModule.scala:40): Binding(interface api.libs.ws.WSClient to ProviderConstructionTarget(class AhcWSClientProvider)) \_ installed by: Modules$OverrideModule -> GuiceableModuleConversions$$anon$4 2 : StandaloneWSClientProvider.<init>(AhcWSModule.scala:232) \_ for 2nd parameter materializer at AhcWSModule.<init>(AhcWSModule.scala:39): Binding(interface api.libs.ws.StandaloneWSClient to ProviderConstructionTarget(class StandaloneWSClientProvider)) \_ installed by: Modules$OverrideModule -> GuiceableModuleConversions$$anon$4 3 : AhcWSModule$AhcWSClientProvider.<init>(AhcWSModule.java:42) \_ for 2nd parameter at BindingKey.toProvider(BindingKey.java:155): Binding(interface play.libs.ws.WSClient to ProviderConstructionTarget(class AhcWSModule$AhcWSClientProvider)) \_ installed by: Modules$OverrideModule -> GuiceableModuleConversions$$anon$4 4 : AhcWSModule$StandaloneWSClientProvider.<init>(AhcWSModule.java:58) \_ for 2nd parameter at BindingKey.toProvider(BindingKey.java:155): Binding(interface play.libs.ws.StandaloneWSClient to ProviderConstructionTarget(class AhcWSModule$StandaloneWSClientProvider)) \_ installed by: Modules$OverrideModule -> GuiceableModuleConversions$$anon$4

testcase.name: HomeController GET / should contain the app name in the body

failure.message:
com.google.inject.CreationException: Unable to create injector, see the following errors:
1) [Guice/MissingImplementation]: No implementation for Materializer was bound.
Requested by: 1 : AhcWSClientProvider.<init>(AhcWSModule.scala:221) \_ for 2nd parameter materializer at AhcWSModule.<init>(AhcWSModule.scala:40): Binding(interface api.libs.ws.WSClient to ProviderConstructionTarget(class AhcWSClientProvider)) \_ installed by: Modules$OverrideModule -> GuiceableModuleConversions$$anon$4 2 : StandaloneWSClientProvider.<init>(AhcWSModule.scala:232) \_ for 2nd parameter materializer at AhcWSModule.<init>(AhcWSModule.scala:39): Binding(interface api.libs.ws.StandaloneWSClient to ProviderConstructionTarget(class StandaloneWSClientProvider)) \_ installed by: Modules$OverrideModule -> GuiceableModuleConversions$$anon$4 3 : AhcWSModule$AhcWSClientProvider.<init>(AhcWSModule.java:42) \_ for 2nd parameter at BindingKey.toProvider(BindingKey.java:155): Binding(interface play.libs.ws.WSClient to ProviderConstructionTarget(class AhcWSModule$AhcWSClientProvider)) \_ installed by: Modules$OverrideModule -> GuiceableModuleConversions$$anon$4 4 : AhcWSModule$StandaloneWSClientProvider.<init>(AhcWSModule.java:58) \_ for 2nd parameter at BindingKey.toProvider(BindingKey.java:155): Binding(interface play.libs.ws.StandaloneWSClient to ProviderConstructionTarget(class AhcWSModule$StandaloneWSClientProvider)) \_ installed by: Modules$OverrideModule -> GuiceableModuleConversions$$anon$4
Learn more: https://github.com/google/guice/wiki/MISSING_IMPLEMENTATION
